purpose: Compare bootstrap-stable fixed-size models, the primary selector, and univariate/penalized feature-selection strategies.
important_caution: Bootstrap-stable and 1-feature models are preferred for interpretability. Selector-comparison models are sensitivity analyses because their top-k set is ranked on the current full run.

models.label: 1 feature - top bootstrap-stable
models.description: Modello compatto costruito dalle feature più stabili al bootstrap. Se non disponibili, usa fallback dalla selezione primaria.

models.label: 3 feature - top bootstrap-stable

models.description: Modello compatto costruito dalle feature più stabili al bootstrap. Se non disponibili, usa fallback dalla selezione primaria.

models.label: 1 feature - primary LASSO / L1 logistic
